rationale: SaaS tool providing auto-solver/bot functionality for IXL. Needs a high-tech, slightly underground, 'Discord-hacker' aesthetic but highly polished. Deep dark mode with neon blue accents perfectly matches the requested EdgyPro 1:1 replica style.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use py-24 for main sections. Max-width 7xl (max-w-7xl) container for content.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Used in the features/pricing section. gap-6 between cards. Cards should have hover effects (-translate-y-1, ring-1 ring-blue-500/50, shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.1)]).
spacing_and_layout.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/70 border-b border-zinc-800 for the sticky navbar.

components.navbar: Sticky header (z-50). Left: Logo 'IXLPro' (Blue text). Center: Links (Features, Purchase, Reviews, Download, Troubleshooting, Services). Right: Trustpilot rating (Stars) and 'All services are online' green dot badge. Glassmorphism bg.
components.hero: H1 text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-bold text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-blue-600. Animated stats (Users, Questions Answered, Discord Members) using framer-motion. Floating hero mockup image on the right side.
components.pricing: Grid cols 1 md:cols-2 lg:cols-3. 6 tiers: Day Key ($2.50), Week Key ($10), Month Key ($25), 3 Month Key ($50), Year Key ($100), Service Key ($120). Include badges like 'Most Popular', 'Best Value'. Cards have 1px solid border-zinc-800, glowing blue border on hover. 'Purchase' buttons.
components.reviews: react-fast-marquee. Discord message style. bg-[#2B2D31] rounded-md p-4, avatar on left, Username (white) and timestamp (gray text-xs) on top, message below (gray-300). Authentic Discord look.
components.setup_download: Two tabs (Desktop / Mobile). Video thumbnail centered. Blue glowing play button overlay.
components.footer: Links grid, social icons (Discord, Twitter). Divider border-zinc-800.

animations.hover: All cards and buttons must scale slightly (scale-105 for primary buttons, -translate-y-1 for cards) and increase glow/shadow.
animations.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0) for hero and pricing grids.
animations.stats: Number counter animation from 0 to target (e.g. 50,000+ Users).

hero_mockup.description: Floating menu mockup showing IXLPro features

setup_video_thumbnail.description: Video thumbnail for the setup tutorial

instructions_to_main_agent: REPLACE ALL instances of 'Edgenuity' with 'IXL' and 'EdgyPro' with 'IXLPro'.
Install and use `lucide-react` and `react-icons` (for Discord, Trustpilot star icons).
Install `react-fast-marquee` for the review carousel. The cards MUST look identical to Discord messages (bg-[#2B2D31], rounded-md, avatar, username, timestamp, gray text).
Build the 6 Pricing tiers explicitly as per instructions: Day Key ($2.50), Week Key ($10), Month Key ($25), 3 Month Key ($50), Year Key ($100), Service Key ($120).
Implement Framer Motion for count-up numbers in the hero section.
Add a 'Status: All services are online' green pulsing indicator in the header.
Ensure the hero image uses the provided mockup URL.
Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, accordion triggers, and form inputs (e.g., data-testid='purchase-button-day-key').
Do NOT use generic grey for backgrounds. Use tinted zinc (e.g. zinc-950, zinc-900).
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Apply them directly in Tailwind classes.
